violations.text: A small accumulation of rodent droppings was observed in the utilities closet. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025

The floor and wall junctures do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Coving was on site, needs to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025
